name: Path Equivalence: 'filename ' (Trailing Space)
description: The product does not properly handle filenames with trailing spaces, which some operating systems (Windows) silently strip during resolution, allowing attackers to bypass access controls that check the space-suffixed form.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename with trailing spaces that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check matches the spaced form while the OS strips spaces during resolution at STORAGE[file_access], creating a check-vs-use mismatch
